lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਲੋਭਾਣੇ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਵਿਡਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: amrit chhodd bikhiaa lobhaane sevaa kareh viddaanee |
lines.english: Discarding the Ambrosial Nectar, they greedily grab the poison; they serve others, instead of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਾ ਧਰਮੁ ਗਵਾਵਹਿ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਦੁਖਿ ਵਿਹਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: aapanaa dharam gavaaveh boojheh naahee anadin dukh vihaanee |
lines.english: They lose their faith, they have no understanding; night and day, they suffer in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅੰਧ ਨ ਚੇਤਹੀ ਡੂਬਿ ਮੁਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਾਣੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: manamukh andh na chetahee ddoob mue bin paanee |1|
lines.english: The blind, self-willed manmukhs do not even think of the Lord; they are drowned to death without water. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਵਿਸਰਿ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad antar vasai taa har visar na jaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: If the Word of the Guru's Shabad abides deep within, then you shall not forget the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਸਦਾ ਭਜਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: man re sadaa bhajahu har saranaaee |
lines.english: O mind, vibrate and meditate forever on the Lord; seek the Protection of His Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਾ ਪੁਤਲਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਦੁਸਟੀ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu sareer maaeaa kaa putalaa vich haumai dusattee paaee |
lines.english: This body is the puppet of Maya. The evil of egotism is within it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣਾ ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣਾ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਪਤਿ ਗਵਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaanaa jaman maranaa manamukh pat gavaaee |
lines.english: Coming and going through birth and death, the self-willed manmukhs lose their honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: satagur sev sadaa sukh paaeaa jotee jot milaaee |2|
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, eternal peace is obtained, and one's light merges into the Light. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਅਤਿ ਸੁਖਾਲੀ ਜੋ ਇਛੇ ਸੋ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satagur kee sevaa at sukhaalee jo ichhe so fal paae |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru brings a deep and profound peace, and one's desires are fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤੁ ਸਤੁ ਤਪੁ ਪਵਿਤੁ ਸਰੀਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jat sat tap pavit sareeraa har har man vasaae |
lines.english: Abstinence, truthfulness and self-discipline are obtained, and the body is purified; the Lord, Har, Har, comes to dwell within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦਿ ਰਹੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sadaa anand rahai din raatee mil preetam sukh paae |3|
lines.english: Such a person remains blissful forever, day and night. Meeting the Beloved, peace is found. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਚੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dar sachai sachee vaddiaaee sahaje sach samaau |
lines.english: In the Court of the True One, they are blessed with true greatness; they are intuitively absorbed into the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਤਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo satagur kee saranaagatee hau tin kai bal jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who seek the Sanctuary of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਉ ॥੪॥੧੨॥੪੫॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree paaeeai guramukh mel milaau |4|12|45|
lines.english: O Nanak, by His Glance of Grace He is found; the Gurmukh is united in His Union. ||4||12||45||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਜੈ ਕੰਤੁ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sejai kant na aavee nit nit hoe khuaar |
lines.english: Her Husband Lord does not come to her bed; day after day, she grows more and more miserable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਣੇ ਜਿਉ ਦੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਤਨਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh karam kamaavane jiau dohaagan tan seegaar |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh performs religious rituals, like the unwanted bride decorating her body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re ik man naam dhiaae |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, meditate on the Naam with one-pointed mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰ ਕਾ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਈ ਨਾ ਦੀਸੈ ਘਰੁ ਬਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pir kaa mehal na paavee naa deesai ghar baar |1|
lines.english: She does not attain the Mansion of His Presence; she does not find the door to His House. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਾ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੈ ਜਪਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: santaa sangat mil rahai jap raam naam sukh paae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Remain united with the Society of the Saints; chant the Name of the Lord, and find peace. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sadaa sohaaganee pir raakhiaa ur dhaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is the happy and pure soul-bride forever. She keeps her Husband Lord enshrined within her heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਠਾ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਨਿਵਿ ਚਲਹਿ ਸੇਜੈ ਰਵੈ ਭਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: mitthaa boleh niv chaleh sejai ravai bhataar |
lines.english: Her speech is sweet, and her way of life is humble. She enjoys the Bed of her Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਭਾਵੰਤੀ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਹੇਤੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sobhaavantee sohaaganee jin gur kaa het apaar |2|
lines.english: The happy and pure soul-bride is noble; she has infinite love for the Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਹੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਕਟੀਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: antarahu dukh bhram katteeai sukh paraapat hoe |
lines.english: Suffering and doubt are cut out from within, and peace is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਜਾ ਭਾਗੈ ਕਾ ਉਦਉ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: poorai bhaag satagur milai jaa bhaagai kaa udau hoe |
lines.english: By perfect good fortune, one meets the True Guru, when one's destiny is awakened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਜੋ ਚਲੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur kai bhaanai jo chalai dukh na paavai koe |3|
lines.english: One who walks in harmony with the Guru's Will shall not suffer in pain. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਤਿਨ ਪੀਆ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਖੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa paraapat tin peea haumai vichahu khoe |
lines.english: Those who are destined to have it, drink it in; their egotism is eradicated from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਭਾਣੇ ਵਿਚਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke bhaane vich amrit hai sahaje paavai koe |
lines.english: The Amrit, the Ambrosial Nectar, is in the Guru's Will. With intuitive ease, it is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਚਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੧੩॥੪੬॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh naam dhiaaeeai sach milaavaa hoe |4|13|46|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh meditates on the Naam, and is united with the True Lord. ||4||13||46||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਦੀਆ ਸੇਈ ਕਰਮ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: sohaaganee karam kamaavadeea seee karam karee |
lines.english: Behave like the happy and pure soul-bride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਆਪਣਾ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਅਗੈ ਧਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa pir jaanai aapanaa tan man agai dharee |
lines.english: If you know that He is your Husband Lord, offer your body and mind to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਜੇ ਲੋਚੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur bhagat na paaeeai je lochai sabh koe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Guru, devotion is not obtained, even though everyone may long for it. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਸਾਚਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੜਾ ਸਾਚੁ ਵਡਾਈ ਦੇਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sahaje saach milaavarraa saach vaddaaee dee |1|
lines.english: With intuitive ease, you shall merge with the True Lord, and He shall bless you with true greatness. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re gur bin bhagat na hoe |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, without the Guru, there is no devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਫੇਰੁ ਪਇਆ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh fer peaa kaaman doojai bhaae |
lines.english: The soul-bride in love with duality goes around the wheel of reincarnation, through 8.4 million incarnations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਪਿਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai pir na paaeeai birathaa janam gavaae |2|
lines.english: Without the Shabad, she does not find her Husband Lord, and her life wastes away in vain. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਨੀਦ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਦੁਖੀ ਰੈਣਿ ਵਿਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur need na aavee dukhee rain vihaae |
lines.english: Without the Guru, she finds no sleep, and she passes her life-night in pain.
